items.headline: SpaceX vs. Blue Origin: Who's Really Winning the Space Race in 2026?
items.summary: SpaceX leads the commercial space sector with unmatched launch frequency and cost efficiency, while Blue Origin makes strides with New Glenn but lags in overall market impact as of mid-2026.

items.label: Starlink
items.headline: Elon Musk Predicts SpaceX Revenue Could Hit $1 Trillion by 2030
items.summary: Elon Musk forecasts SpaceX could achieve $1 trillion in revenue by 2030, driven by Starlink and reusable rockets, despite facing technical, regulatory, and competitive challenges.
